description: CompositionDark blue denim jeggings made of 98% cotton and 2% lycra, with the waist elasticated at the back, two back pockets with embroidery and mock pockets on the frontFittingRegularWash careMachine or hand wash separatelyUse mild detergent onlyDo not bleach or wringDry in shadeMedium ironWith the look of jeans and style of leggings, these jeggings from jealous 21 are a great addition to any woman's wardrobe. The elasticated waist fits snugly, while you can team this with a stylish top and comfortable footwear from the wide range at myntra for that casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears jeans of length 39"Height: 5'8&rdquo Waist: 26&rdquo Hips: 36&rdquo
